testerConclusion: Vendor-name bait leak is resolved on independently tested public chat surfaces.

fullStandaloneBattery.result: All six routes had no vendor terms in the vendor-bait assistant reply. Five routes passed outright. Serra Honda returned a transient generic assistant-unavailable fallback on the first post-deploy full run, with no vendor terms.

serraHondaFocusedRerun.result: PASS. Serra Honda vendor-bait reply was a dealer-safe Huminic deflection with no vendor terms.

sharedHandlerSpotCheck.result: PASS. Ford of Columbia storefront Web Chat and dealer-embed Web Chat both loaded the shared /w/ford-of-columbia-sales-chat iframe and returned vendor-clean Huminic deflections.

remainingRisk: A single transient Serra Honda assistant-unavailable fallback occurred in the first post-deploy full run; it did not leak vendor terms and was not reproduced in the focused rerun. No new finding opened unless it repeats.
openLaunchGatesAfterThis: LC-BLOCKER-001 video wrapper-source provider host exposure requires fix, disablement, or explicit waiver
Platform 4 phone testing still needs outbound-call approval or an equivalent representative caller path
LC-MAJOR-007 partner/group admin scope remains a product decision
